mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate, t.project_id AS projectId, t.task_manager AS taskManagerId FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.task_manager = #{userCode} AND t.finish_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 7 ORDER BY t.finish_date ASC

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, p.project_describe AS projectDescribe, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.finish_date AS finishDate, COUNT(t.task_id) AS totalTasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) AS completedTasks, CASE WHEN COUNT(t.task_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(t.task_id)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS taskProgress FROM project p INNER JOIN members m ON p.project_id = m.project_id LEFT JOIN task t ON p.project_id = t.project_id WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC
